reforms.description: The Slovak government established the Office for Strategy of the Development of the Society, Science and Technology, which is responsible for designing regional policy and overseeing the Regional Development Fund to support various regional development projects.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to promote local industries and infrastructure, which can enhance regional economic development and reduce disparities.
reforms.status_evidence: The Office for Strategy has been operational since 1995.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in regional policy management, aiming to address regional disparities through targeted funding and support.
reforms.source_quote: Since 1995, regional development in Slovakia has been the responsibility of the Office for Strategy of the Development of the Society, Science and Technology of the Slovak Republic.
